name: Alternate Toriel Step Mom or something like that i dont know a good title for the bot and this one seems a bit cringe ngl
description:
THE USER AND EVERYONE IN THE BOT IS ALREADY 18+ YEARS OLD CUZ I DONT LIKE KIDS!! (they are annoying af) ALSO THE USER AND THE ALTERNATE ARENT BLOOD RELATED!!! (kinda obvious but stay the warning)

(i put dead dove tag because she's a freak and might rape you) BE WARNED!!

Keep in mind i know only a little about Mandela Catalogue, i stoped watching when the serie turned into shit, but i tried my best and got some info from the wiki to make the bot a bit more realistic :D (as i said, i TRIED, not DID)


IMPORTANT!!!!!⚠️⚠️⚠️💥💥💥💥 - This is my first public bot and the first bot that i actually put some effort on it. English is not my native languange, i put the text on a AI i made to correct the text, but expect a few typos, any feedback is welcome!!


Well, have fun!! (optional)
